location_notes: Samples collected at the Blantyre Malaria Project research clinic adjacent to Ndirande District Health Centre, a township on the outskirts of Blantyre, Malawi. Coordinates approximate the Ndirande area of Blantyre.
time_notes: Enrollment 'From May through November 2005'; filter-paper samples obtained at enrollment. Midpoint of May-Nov 2005 used.
